faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Pelham?
faqs.answer: Pelham homes typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and jumping spiders. Occasionally, we also see sac spiders and orb weavers around exterior areas. While most local spiders are harmless, they can multiply quickly and create unsightly webs throughout your home.

This includes a thorough inspection, interior and exterior treatment, web removal, and preventative measures to keep spiders from returning.
